events.message: Plan 028-org-member-invite-flow execution started. 4 tasks, concurrency limit 2. Wave 1: task-1 + task-4. Wave 2: task-2 + task-3 (after task-1 completes).
task-1-team spawned: executor-1 (opus), reviewer-1 (sonnet), tester-1 (sonnet)
task-1 entered planning stage
task-4-team spawned: executor-4 (opus), reviewer-4 (sonnet), tester-4 (sonnet)
task-4 entered planning stage
task-1 entered review stage (planning ~3m; implementation stage not reported separately)
task-1 retry #1 — review failed, executor-1 reworking implementation (review took ~90s)
task-4 entered review stage (planning ~5m)
task-4 retry #1 — review failed, executor-4 reworking implementation (review took ~91s)
task-1 retry #2 — second review failure, executor-1 reworking again (cumulative review time ~280s)
task-1 completed after 2 retries. Total elapsed ~9m. Wave 2 (task-2 + task-3) now unblocked.
task-1-team decommissioned: executor-1, reviewer-1, tester-1 ended
task-2-team spawned: executor-2 (opus), reviewer-2 (sonnet), tester-2 (sonnet)
task-2 entered planning stage

task-2 completed with 0 retries — first-pass review success. Total elapsed ~8m26s.

task-3 completed with 0 retries — first-pass review success. Total elapsed ~9m48s.
task-3-team decommissioned: executor-3, reviewer-3, tester-3 ended
All 4 tasks completed. Total wall-clock time ~22m37s. 3 retries total across plan.
